title: RPG! Simply [Fabric]
description: RPGs pack without the overwhelming complexity.
body:
![thumbnail~](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35473031ce2a6625a3773f0e102266581ca4f745_0.webp)


Tired of overly complicated RPG modpacks? SimplyRPG is designed for players who want RPG without the complexity. I’ve stripped away classes and confusing mechanics to focus on what matters most: Pure Adventure.



![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44e856c1b2a49cf6572507a7f7d767689768f4fa.png)

## Key Highlights
- Your goal is still the Ender Dragon, but the journey is overhauled with epic bosses and structures.

- Find unique Eye Shards hidden across the world to unlock the End portal.

- Experience stunning landscapes powered by Tectonic, and Terralith.

- Action-Packed Combat: Smooth, weapon-based animations via Better Combat for a modern feel.

- Fully Optimized: Pre-configured with Sodium and ModernFix for a lag-free experience on most systems.

- Play with Friends: Host your world instantly using essential server.
##

### To ensure the smoothest experience and eliminate lag spikes with 320+ mods, we highly recommend using Java 21 with the following JVM Arguments. Copy and paste this into your launcher settings:

```
-Xmx8G -Xms6G -XX:+UseZGC -XX:+ZGenerational -XX:+UnlockExperimentalVMOptions
```
